mapper.sql: id, snapshot_id, symbol, name, market_type, holding_quantity, available_quantity, cost_price, current_price, cost_amount, market_value, unrealized_pnl, pnl_rate, position_ratio, sort_order, remark, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO portfolio_position_snapshot_item ( snapshot_id, symbol, name, market_type, holding_quantity, available_quantity, cost_price, current_price, cost_amount, market_value, unrealized_pnl, pnl_rate, position_ratio, sort_order, remark ) VALUES
( #{item.snapshotId}, #{item.symbol}, #{item.name}, #{item.marketType}, #{item.holdingQuantity}, #{item.availableQuantity}, #{item.costPrice}, #{item.currentPrice}, #{item.costAmount}, #{item.marketValue}, #{item.unrealizedPnl}, #{item.pnlRate}, #{item.positionRatio}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.remark} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM portfolio_position_snapshot_item WHERE snapshot_id = #{snapshotId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
